## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.

Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (non-breaking chore/doc change)

## Testing Environment

- [ ] Backend tested locally (Node.js/Express)
- [ ] Frontend build verified (no errors)
- [ ] Python AI service tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Unit/Integration tests added or updated
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (if frontend change)

## Visual Proof

If your change affects the UI, include screenshots below:

| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
| (insert before screenshot) | (insert after screenshot) |

## Security Compliance

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or tokens committed
- [ ] Input validation/sanitization applied where needed
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checks are in place
- [ ] Environment variables used for sensitive config

## Responsiveness & Accessibility

- [ ] UI renders correctly on mobile, tablet, and desktop
- [ ] ARIA labels or roles added where appropriate
- [ ] Focus indicators are visible for keyboard navigation
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
